name: Crypto Price Monitor
description:
Monitor cryptocurrency prices via CoinGecko API, with price threshold and percentage change alerts.

Alert rules: for each token listed in tokens, add optional config keys (replace {token} with the CoinGecko ID):
  {token}_alert_below — alert when price drops below this value, e.g. solana_alert_below = 150
  {token}_alert_above — alert when price rises above this value, e.g. solana_alert_above = 250
  {token}_alert_change_pct — alert when 24h change exceeds this absolute percentage, e.g. solana_alert_change_pct = 10
author: Sidefy Team

tokens.description: CoinGecko token IDs to monitor, comma-separated. Example: solana,bitcoin,ethereum

interval_minutes.description: Minimum interval in minutes between API calls. Price data is cached for this duration. Default 15.

alert_cooldown_hours.description: Cooldown in hours before the same alert condition can fire again for the same token. Default 6. Set to 0 to disable.
